task_completion.description: Navigate to the Talon user directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer window, terminal, or text editor save dialog showing the path C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user.
A file named 'medical_terms.talon-list' is visible in the file explorer or as an open tab in a text editor.

task_completion.description: Write the required medical terms and abbreviations into the list file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor shows the content of 'medical_terms.talon-list' starting with 'list: user.medical_terms' followed by a '-' and the list of terms (e.g., 'blood pressure: BP', 'heart rate: HR').

task_completion.description: Create the Talon dictation command file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'medical_dictation.talon' is visible in the file explorer or as an open tab in a text editor.

task_completion.description: Write the required voice commands into the dictation file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor shows the content of 'medical_dictation.talon' containing the commands 'med <user.medical_terms>:' and 'med expand <user.medical_terms>:' with corresponding 'insert(...)' actions.

integrity.description: The files are actually saved in the correct directory
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor tabs do not show an 'unsaved' indicator (like a dot or asterisk), or the files are clearly visible in the file explorer at the correct path.

integrity.description: The files have the exact required extensions without hidden .txt suffixes
integrity.visual_evidence: The filenames are exactly 'medical_terms.talon-list' and 'medical_dictation.talon' in the editor or file explorer, with no '.txt' appended.

integrity.description: The agent manually created the files and typed or pasted the content
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with a text editor (like Notepad or VS Code) to create the files, rather than running a terminal command to generate them automatically.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target directory: C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user. Required list file: medical_terms.talon-list. Required command file: medical_dictation.talon.
